workflow.name: Generate multilingual social content with GPT-4o, Telegram and Google Sheets
workflow.description:
## How it works

1. Triggers when a message is received on Telegram.
2. Checks conditions and either sends a default message or processes the message for content generation.
3. Uses an AI agent to generate rich content including images and text.
4. Formats and sends generated text in multiple languages (English, Polish, Spanish) over Telegram.
5. Saves generated image data and logs it into a Google Sheet.
6. Sends back image content to Telegram as a photo message.

## Setup steps

- Configure Telegram credentials in the Telegram Trigger and other Telegram nodes.
- Set up OpenAI API access for content generation.
- Connect to Google Sheets with appropriate API credentials.

## Customization

Language options for text messages can be extended by adding more language nodes.

## Part of the AI Content Master system

This workflow works together with the Moderator workflow:
- 👉 AI Content Master — Content Moderator with Telegram and Social Media Posting: https://n8n.io/workflows/15361

parameters.content:
## AI Content Master Generator

### How it works

1. Triggers when a message is received on Telegram.
2. Checks conditions and either sends a default message or processes the message for content generation.
3. Uses an AI agent to generate rich content including images and text.
4. Formats and sends generated text in multiple languages over Telegram.
5. Saves generated image data and logs it into a Google Sheet.
6. Sends back image content to Telegram as a photo message.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure Telegram credentials for messaging services.
- [ ] Set up OpenAI API access for content generation.
- [ ] Connect to Google Sheets with appropriate API credentials.

### Customization

Language options for text messages can be extended by adding more language nodes.

## Trigger and condition check

Listens for messages from Telegram and checks the condition to determine the response path.

## AI content processing

Processes the content using an AI agent and formats JSON output.

## Send default message

Sends a predefined message via Telegram in case the condition fails.

## Generate multiple language messages

Generates and sends messages in different languages.

## Generate image and log data

Generates an image and logs the data into Google Sheets, then sends back the photo.

parameters.prompt:
={{ $json.image_prompt }}

Technical requirements: photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 4K quality, professional photography style. Cinematic lighting with warm golden tones. No text, no watermarks, no logos. Aspect ratio 1:1. Style: Cinematic Archaeology meets Corporate Leadership — ancient wisdom meets modern business world.

parameters.text: ⛔ Sorry, this bot only works for its owner.

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
